title: Red Black GUI
description: Make your inventory to red and black colors.
body:
This pack make your inventory to red and black colours.
 
 Other functional blocks:
- Crafting Table
- Furnace
- Blast Furnace
- Smoker
- Shulker Box
- Enchanting Table
- Brewing Stand
- Crafter
- Dispenser
